jobs.title: Short & Mid-Form Video Editing
jobs.description:
I have a steady flow of raw clips that need to be turned into polished short- and medium-length videos. All pieces revolve around AI content and are destined for social-media marketing, with a strong push toward audience engagement rather than paid ad campaigns.  

Here’s what I’m looking for: clean cuts, engaging pacing, on-brand text overlays or captions where they add value, and light sound design so each video feels ready to upload the moment I receive it. Final files should be delivered in the usual formats for Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube, plus a 16:9 version for longer placement
